title: Soulection Radio Show #446
content:
A few deep cuts blended with live performances from NPR Tiny Desk

<!--more-->

Shout out to Carl Edwards for compiling ["Joe Kay Taught Me" Spotify Playlist](https://open.spotify.com/playlist/5i8meKAf6wKcy2Cl1PpoIT) that unlocks over 1000 nolstagic sounds of Soulection.
